name: narrator prompt surface: space opera role and roll resume

source.purpose: Ticket 08: protect space-opera Narrator role surface through system assembly and preserve roll-resume message behavior after prompt module extraction.

frame.title: Forty Thousand
frame.premise: A departure hold turns debt into immediate leverage.
frame.activePressure: The port authority can keep the ship docked until the debt is answered.
frame.centralTension: Leaving quickly risks making the debt permanent.
frame.objective: Get the ship cleared to depart.
frame.crucible: The captain must choose between paperwork, pressure, and a risky departure.

outcomeSpectrum.costly: The ship departs with a new obligation attached.
outcomeSpectrum.failure: The port keeps the ship docked.
outcomeSpectrum.catastrophic: The creditor converts the hold into seizure authority.

antagonistField.escalationLogic: Each failed workaround moves the hold closer to seizure.

priorMessages.content: Pre-roll scene packet and current turn delta.

input.why: Thread the launch corridor before the hold propagates.
input.consequence_on_fail: The port authority marks the ship for manual clearance.

systemContainsAll: Press Nara on who really bought the route.
